examples: For me, it was once a kid at mile 17 of the Boston Marathon who handed me a popsicle on an 86 degree day.
The next day, the stick he'd used to stir the water and flavored powder mixture had frozen, creating the first popsicle.
She had lost weight: her eyes were sunken and her pale forearms looked like Popsicle sticks.
So grab a popsicle or a cold one and dive in -- the water's just right.
